assumption: Barrier Schur Compression Lemma: if F_w(theta)>=0 then (theta_i-theta_j)(grad_i F_w(theta)-grad_j F_w(theta))<=0 for all i,j.
conclusion: The Golay shell-domination inequality holds for w=12,16.
exact_two_level_role: Closes all two-level threshold endpoints and supports a weaker threshold-compression route.
name: Barrier Schur Conditional Closure Theorem
proof_spine: Use scale invariance to get sum_i grad_i F=0.
Barrier Schur compression gives <theta,g><=0 on F>=0.
Radial compression phi(s)=F((1-s)theta) has phi'(s)>=0 whenever phi(s)>=0.
Since phi(1)=F(0)=0, no phi(0)>0 is possible.
remaining_unproved: The Barrier Schur Compression Lemma itself.
